TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == Bu-s buyu'ŚĮĆŚ£ęŚĪĪ Bu-s-san Lipun a kamuŚĮĆŚ£ęŚĪĪ‚ďėÔľŹ„ĀĶ„Āė„Āē„āď Fujisan" Lipun nu mibalatay miawas tu Cin-kang-syen atu San-li-syen nu mauzipay lamal buyu', tini i Tang-cin satip nutimilan 80 kung-lian, u talakaw nu buyu' 3775.63 depah, u satalakaway a buyu' nu Lipun. tukun nu Bu-s buyu' kasienawan masaupu ku suleda, katukuh zuma a mihcaan tu 6,7 a bulad kya malananum, tungus nu mikuwanan u tiniay a kakitizaanay liwliw nu Bu-s syang-ken-i-tu nu kanatalay a piidangan. i Bu-s buyu' liwliw nu san-lu, kababenis u abesaay a taku, pulung nu ngangan Bu-s lima a taku, u singanganay nu Lipun piidangan a kitizaan. Bu-s buyu' sepat ku angangan a sacumud nu tabuyu'ay, pasazuma u Bu-s pitaungan a sacumud, Si-co sacumudan,i-tyencang sacumud, Bu-s-ci-tyen "he-kow taku" a sacumudan, zuma ayaw tulu ku sacumud a tabuyu' hatu i Cin-kang labu nu sakuwan. nilaculan Bu-s buyu' singangan tu Lipun pay-min buyu', namahiza u nu Lipun san-min san, i kasumamadan a nisulitan matangangan tu caay ku sakatus, caay u hu-ce, panganganen aca tu bu-lung-bung, hu-i aca u bu-ye. Maka sumamadan, uyni a buyu' a ngangan i Lipun hina tahkal ku sumamaday a dadiw.BU-s buyu' atu sakula, sin-kan-syen mapalecad mahiza nu Lipun a kanatal. Bu-s buyu' atu cyen-cin-sen-se u liwliw nu Bu-s byu' i 2013 a mihca 6 a bulad 22 a demid I angil a sinkuan atu nalimaan tatenga' tu mapili' tu nu kitakitay lalangawan nu niliwanan a zaysang, saka 17 kitakitay lalangawan nu niliwanan a zaysang "saka13 nu kitakitay lalangawan nu niliwanan a zaysang" "syang-s-Bu-s" hamin nu kitakit kasa kitizaan singangan tu Bu-s buyu'. likisi a kapuwak nu silamalay buyu' ÁĀęŚĪĪŚôīÁôľŚŹ≤ ayawa laed pakala tu 1 emang 1 malebut a mihcaan, sumamaday a Bu-s nu tukun satipad malingatu mapuwak yadah ku nipatahkal tu syen-u yen lalla' malaba'tu. uyni maluminakay a ba'tu masa nu ayzaay a Bu-s buyu' angangnan baluhay a Bu-s. zikuz, sumamaday a Bu-s atu baluhay a Bu-s i tukun masilac tu ku tuud, ayaw pakala tu 2500-2800 a mihcaan tukun nu sumamaday a Bu-s tu pasazuma makay i bung-hwa a kawaw, malengat tu ku tabakiay a kapelad, sazikuzay u tuku nu Bu-s tu dadsa' ku liwan. u nipiasip,laed tu 1 emang 1 malebut katukuh ayaw nu 8 lasubu a mihcaan tu 3000 a mihcaan, baluhay tukun nu Bu-s mahiza tu caay kaketun ku kapuwah tahkal ku malungusay a ba'tu. zikuz tukunay nayi' ku baluhay akapuwah, nika u Cng-wi buyu' atu Paw-yung buyu'an takinilan silamalay buyu' sasawni mapuwah. likisi makayniay tu kapuwah izaw ku nisulitan, kung-yen 800 a mihcaan katukuh 802 a mihcaan "Lipun a kuyumi 19-21 a mihcaan" a kuyumi mapuwah", atu 864 a mihcaan "Lipun cin-kwang 6 a mihcaan" a cing-kwang mapuwah. Sazikuzay mapuwah nu Bu-s buyu' u i 1707 a mihcaan "Lippunpaw-yung 4 a mihcaan", ayzaay u Paw-yung buyu' nipatahkal tu wacah katukuh tu baliay a culil nu pabaway a bali, itawya u Cyang-hu "ayzaay a Tung-ci" sasaay a silamalay buyu' masaupu tu ku anabu sepat hunan ku kibetul, 4ŚÖ¨ŚąÜŚéö. zikuz maazih tu ku silamalay buyu' a ninel atu nikapuwah a wacah. migingkiway tu lala' Bu-s buyu' tungusa u mauzipay nu silamalay buyu', nika piasip tu nikapuwah caay ku kakatalawan. Duduc tu Tung-cin ta-sye migingkiway tu ninel i 2004 a mihca 4 a bulad mikawaw micekiw mikingsa, I pabaw tu tuluay abuyu' isasa izaw t uku sumamaday buyu'an. sakasepat kuyni a buyu'an mapangangan tu sadidi'ay i-ye. i kasumamadan Lipun a ziday a dadiw "wan-ye-ci", yadah ku makayniay i Bu-s buyu' a nisilitan, uzuma sn-pucezen nu apuyu'ay a dadiw ku singanganay. u wan-ye-cyaw-min uyaanaytu a nisulitan, ayza a ziday nisulita tu nu Lipun ), taneng pawacay tu kapuwah nu Bu-s buyu' a zidayan saayaway nikiluan tu nisulitan, u "si-ze-pen-ci" tudadan mikilu tu 781 a mihcaan tu "tin-ing-yen mihcaan" makay Bu-s buyu' mapuwah tahkal ku anabuh nu silamalay buyu'. i pin-an a ziday misanga' tu "cu-ci-u-i" makayni u nikiluan taneng a matineng tu tawyaay mauzipay nu silamalay a Bu-s buyu'. Bu-s buyu' a singkuŚĮĆŚ£ęŚĪĪŚģóśēô Cyang-hu a ziday mukayakay tu Bu-s buyu' i binawlanan madengdengay. amin ku bnawlan,. Binawlan amin sakay Bi-s buyu' icelang ku singku, micidek I Cyang-hu paykitizaan yadah ku niatulan tu tanem. mahiniay "Bu-s tadem. uyza taneng micekul tu Bu-s buyu' u lala' ku sapisaupu nu tademaway a nisannga'an aadidi'ay a buyu', i adidi'ay tukun nu buyu' patizeng tu pantaay a sen-se pitaungan nu tademaw. namahiza, caay katayza i Bu-s buyu' taneng itini mitanam mukayayay tu Bu-a buyu'. Mahiniay Bu-s tanem yadah ku mapanganganay u "cyen-cyen-san" anucaay caw-syung-san". uzuma makay kang-wan micekul tu Bu-s buyu', patizeng tu cyen-cyen-sen-se nu ba'tuay paya a salisin. Bu-s buyu' paymihcaan 9 a bulad nu teban kastukuh 10 a bulad nu teban malingatu sisuleda, tukun nu buyu' masaupu ku suleda, katukuh zuma a mihcaan tu 6 a bulad haymaw satu malananum, uzuma 7 a bulad nu teban mahiza tu sisuleda. Sakasa paymihcaan tu 7, 8 a buladan u sakapahay a puu' a mukayakay tu Bu-s a buyu', zuma a puu'an edepen ku buyu' 8 a bulad yadah ku baliyus, sakapahay 7 a bulad mukayakay tu Bu-s buyu'. kanahatu u talaka nu Bu-s buyu' katukuh 3776 depah, nika kasa cumudan a tabuyu' hatu I 2000 depah, sisa u madayumay tu, caay piecaw ku tademaw taneng tu mukayaka tya buyu', paymihcaan pinaay a emang ku mukayakayay a tademaw tu Bu-s a buyu', pangkiw ku tademaw malekuay tatukun nu buyu'. tabuyu', makay u-he-mu katukuh tukud nu buyu' tanektekay a tademaw 7 katukuh 10 a tatukuan ku nipalawpe tu tatukian, mudebu 3 katukuh 5 a tatukian ku nipalapes tu tatuki. ayzaay a mihcaan tatultul sa mabuwah, liwliw nu Bu-s buyu' tini dada' I 2021 a mihca 12 a bulad 3 a demiad uyni a demiad kina sepat tu t uku ninel, katuud ku maenepay tu nikabuwah. sakamu sa ku migingkiway sangaleb anuayaw a muliyaw aca tu tabakiay a ninel tu 9.0. . malalitin tu i hekalay atu natinengan
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == bu-s buju Ē~ °*** bu-s-san r~…ĺipun a kamu********* fujisan" r~…ĺipun nu mibar~…ĺataj miawas tu ¶in-kaŇč-sj…ôn atu san-r~…ĺi-sj…ôn nu mauzipaj r~…ĺamar~…ĺ buju Ē~ °, tini i taŇč- ¶in satip nutimir~…ĺan ** kuŇč-r~…ĺian, u tar~…ĺakaw nu buju Ē~ ° ****.** d…ôpańß, u satar~…ĺakawaj a buju Ē~ ° nu r~…ĺipun. tukun nu bu-s buju Ē~ ° kasi…ônawan masaupu ku sur~…ĺ…ôda, katukuńß zuma a mińß ¶aan tu *,* a bur~…ĺad kja mar~…ĺananum, tuŇčus nu mikuwanan u tiniaj a kakitizaanaj r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw nu bu-s sjaŇč-k…ôn-i-tu nu kanatar~…ĺaj a piidaŇčan. i bu-s buju Ē~ ° r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw nu san-r~…ĺu, kabab…ônis u ab…ôsaaj a taku, pur~…ĺuŇč nu ŇčaŇčan bu-s r~…ĺima a taku, u siŇčaŇčanaj nu r~…ĺipun piidaŇčan a kitizaan. bu-s buju Ē~ ° s…ôpat ku aŇčaŇčan a sa ¶umud nu tabuju Ē~ °aj, pasazuma u bu-s pitauŇčan a sa ¶umud, si- ¶o sa ¶umudan,i-tj…ôn ¶aŇč sa ¶umud, bu-s- ¶i-tj…ôn "ńß…ô-kow taku" a sa ¶umudan, zuma ajaw tur~…ĺu ku sa ¶umud a tabuju Ē~ ° ńßatu i ¶in-kaŇč r~…ĺabu nu paŇčaŇčan…ôn a ¶a tu bu-r~…ĺuŇč-buŇč, ńßu-i a ¶a u bu-j…ô. maka sumamadan, ujni a buju Ē~ ° a ŇčaŇčan i r~…ĺipun ńßina tańßkar~…ĺ ku sumamadaj a dadiw.bu-s buju Ē~ ° atu sakur~…ĺa, sin-kan-sj…ôn tu pasazuma makaj i buŇč-ńßwa a kawaw, mar~…ĺ…ôŇčat tu ku tabakiaj a kap…ôr~…ĺad, sazikuzaj u tuku nu bu-s tu dadsa Ē~ ° ku r~…ĺiwan. u nipiasip,r~…ĺa…ôd tu * …ômaŇč * mar~…ĺ…ôbut katukuńß ajaw nu * bi-s buju Ē~ ° i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč ku siŇčku, mi ¶id…ôk i ¶jaŇč-ńßu pajkitizaan jadańß ku niatur~…ĺan tu tan…ôm. mańßiniaj "bu-s tad…ôm. ujza tan…ôŇč mi ¶…ôkur~…ĺ tu bu-s buju Ē~ ° u r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° ku sapisaupu nu tad…ômawaj a nisanŇča Ē~ °an aadidi Ē~ °aj a buju Ē~ °, i adidi Ē~ °aj tukun nu buju Ē~ ° patiz…ôŇč tu pantaaj a s…ôn-s…ô pitauŇčan nu tad…ômaw. namańßiza, ¶aaj katajza i bu-s buju Ē~ ° tan…ôŇč itini mitanam mukajajaj tu bu-a buju Ē~ °. mańßiniaj bu-s tan…ôm jadańß ku mapaŇčaŇčanaj u " ¶j…ôn- ¶j…ôn-san" anu ¶aaj ¶aw-sjuŇč-san". uzuma makaj kaŇč-wan mi ¶…ôkur~…ĺ tu bu-s buju Ē~ °, patiz…ôŇč tu ¶j…ôn- ¶j…ôn-s…ôn-s…ô nu ba Ē~ °tuaj paja a sar~…ĺisin. bu-s buju Ē~ ° pajmińß ¶aan * a bur~…ĺad nu t…ôban kastukuńß ** a bur~…ĺad nu t…ôban mar~…ĺiŇčatu sisur~…ĺ…ôda, tukun nu buju Ē~ ° masaupu ku sur~…ĺ…ôda, katukuńß zuma a mińß ¶aan tu * a bur~…ĺad ńßajmaw satu mar~…ĺananum, uzuma * a bur~…ĺad nu t…ôban mańßiza tu sisur~…ĺ…ôda. sakasa pajmińß ¶aan tu *, * a bur~…ĺadan u sakapańßaj a puu Ē~ ° a mukajakaj tu bu-s a buju Ē~ °, zuma a puu Ē~ °an …ôd…ôp…ôn ku buju Ē~ ° * a bur~…ĺad jadańß ku bar~…ĺijus, sakapańßaj * a bur~…ĺad mukajakaj tu bu-s buju Ē~ °. kanańßatu u tar~…ĺaka nu bu-s buju Ē~ ° katukuńß **** d…ôpańß, nika kasa ¶umudan a tabuju Ē~ ° ńßatu i **** d…ôpańß, sisa u madajumaj tu, ¶aaj pi…ô ¶aw ku tad…ômaw tan…ôŇč tu mukajaka tja buju Ē~ °, pajmińß ¶aan pinaaj a …ômaŇč ku mukajakajaj a tad…ômaw tu bu-s a buju Ē~ °, paŇčkiw ku tad…ômaw mar~…ĺ…ôkuaj tatukun nu buju Ē~ °. tabuju Ē~ °, makaj u-ńß…ô-mu katukuńß tukud nu buju Ē~ ° tan…ôkt…ôkaj a tad…ômaw * katukuńß ** a tatukuan ku nipar~…ĺawp…ô tu tatukian, mud…ôbu * katukuńß * a tatukian ku nipar~…ĺap…ôs tu tatuki. ajzaaj a mińß ¶aan tatur~…ĺtur~…ĺ sa mabuwańß, r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw nu bu-s buju Ē~ ° tini dada Ē~ ° i **** a mińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad ujni a d…ômiad kina s…ôpat tu t uku nin…ôr~…ĺ, katuud ku ma…ôn…ôpaj tu nikabuwańß. sakamu sa ku migiŇčkiwaj saŇčar~…ĺ…ôb anuajaw a mur~…ĺijaw a ¶a tu tabakiaj a nin…ôr~…ĺ tu *.*. . mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu natin…ôŇčan
S.FORM: == kakiliman == Bu-s buyu'ŚĮĆŚ£ęŚĪĪ Bu-s-san Lipun a kamuŚĮĆŚ£ęŚĪĪ‚ďėÔľŹ„ĀĶ„Āė„Āē„āď Fujisan" Lipun nu mibalatay miawas tu Cin-kang-syen atu San-li-syen nu mauzipay lamal buyu', tini i Tang-cin satip nutimilan 80 kung-lian, u talakaw nu buyu' 3775.63 depah, u satalakaway a buyu' nu Lipun. tukun nu Bu-s buyu' kasienawan masaupu ku suleda, katukuh zuma a mihcaan tu 6,7 a bulad kya malananum, tungus nu mikuwanan u tiniay a kakitizaanay liwliw nu Bu-s syang-ken-i-tu nu kanatalay a piidangan. i Bu-s buyu' liwliw nu san-lu, kababenis u abesaay a taku, pulung nu ngangan Bu-s lima a taku, u singanganay nu Lipun piidangan a kitizaan. Bu-s buyu' sepat ku angangan a sacumud nu tabuyu'ay, pasazuma u Bu-s pitaungan a sacumud, Si-co sacumudan,i-tyencang sacumud, Bu-s-ci-tyen "he-kow taku" a sacumudan, zuma ayaw tulu ku sacumud a tabuyu' hatu i Cin-kang labu nu sakuwan. nilaculan Bu-s buyu' singangan tu Lipun pay-min buyu', namahiza u nu Lipun san-min san, i kasumamadan a nisulitan matangangan tu caay ku sakatus, caay u hu-ce, panganganen aca tu bu-lung-bung, hu-i aca u bu-ye. Maka sumamadan, uyni a buyu' a ngangan i Lipun hina tahkal ku sumamaday a dadiw.BU-s buyu' atu sakula, sin-kan-syen mapalecad mahiza nu Lipun a kanatal. Bu-s buyu' atu cyen-cin-sen-se u liwliw nu Bu-s byu' i 2013 a mihca 6 a bulad 22 a demid I angil a sinkuan atu nalimaan tatenga' tu mapili' tu nu kitakitay lalangawan nu niliwanan a zaysang, saka 17 kitakitay lalangawan nu niliwanan a zaysang "saka13 nu kitakitay lalangawan nu niliwanan a zaysang" "syang-s-Bu-s" hamin nu kitakit kasa kitizaan singangan tu Bu-s buyu'. likisi a kapuwak nu silamalay buyu' ÁĀęŚĪĪŚôīÁôľŚŹ≤ ayawa laed pakala tu 1 emang 1 malebut a mihcaan, sumamaday a Bu-s nu tukun satipad malingatu mapuwak yadah ku nipatahkal tu syen-u yen lalla' malaba'tu. uyni maluminakay a ba'tu masa nu ayzaay a Bu-s buyu' angangnan baluhay a Bu-s. zikuz, sumamaday a Bu-s atu baluhay a Bu-s i tukun masilac tu ku tuud, ayaw pakala tu 2500-2800 a mihcaan tukun nu sumamaday a Bu-s tu pasazuma makay i bung-hwa a kawaw, malengat tu ku tabakiay a kapelad, sazikuzay u tuku nu Bu-s tu dadsa' ku liwan. u nipiasip,laed tu 1 emang 1 malebut katukuh ayaw nu 8 lasubu a mihcaan tu 3000 a mihcaan, baluhay tukun nu Bu-s mahiza tu caay kaketun ku kapuwah tahkal ku malungusay a ba'tu. zikuz tukunay nayi' ku baluhay akapuwah, nika u Cng-wi buyu' atu Paw-yung buyu'an takinilan silamalay buyu' sasawni mapuwah. likisi makayniay tu kapuwah izaw ku nisulitan, kung-yen 800 a mihcaan katukuh 802 a mihcaan "Lipun a kuyumi 19-21 a mihcaan" a kuyumi mapuwah", atu 864 a mihcaan "Lipun cin-kwang 6 a mihcaan" a cing-kwang mapuwah. Sazikuzay mapuwah nu Bu-s buyu' u i 1707 a mihcaan "Lippunpaw-yung 4 a mihcaan", ayzaay u Paw-yung buyu' nipatahkal tu wacah katukuh tu baliay a culil nu pabaway a bali, itawya u Cyang-hu "ayzaay a Tung-ci" sasaay a silamalay buyu' masaupu tu ku anabu sepat hunan ku kibetul, 4ŚÖ¨ŚąÜŚéö. zikuz maazih tu ku silamalay buyu' a ninel atu nikapuwah a wacah. migingkiway tu lala' Bu-s buyu' tungusa u mauzipay nu silamalay buyu', nika piasip tu nikapuwah caay ku kakatalawan. Duduc tu Tung-cin ta-sye migingkiway tu ninel i 2004 a mihca 4 a bulad mikawaw micekiw mikingsa, I pabaw tu tuluay abuyu' isasa izaw t uku sumamaday buyu'an. sakasepat kuyni a buyu'an mapangangan tu sadidi'ay i-ye. i kasumamadan Lipun a ziday a dadiw "wan-ye-ci", yadah ku makayniay i Bu-s buyu' a nisilitan, uzuma sn-pucezen nu apuyu'ay a dadiw ku singanganay. u wan-ye-cyaw-min uyaanaytu a nisulitan, ayza a ziday nisulita tu nu Lipun ), taneng pawacay tu kapuwah nu Bu-s buyu' a zidayan saayaway nikiluan tu nisulitan, u "si-ze-pen-ci" tudadan mikilu tu 781 a mihcaan tu "tin-ing-yen mihcaan" makay Bu-s buyu' mapuwah tahkal ku anabuh nu silamalay buyu'. i pin-an a ziday misanga' tu "cu-ci-u-i" makayni u nikiluan taneng a matineng tu tawyaay mauzipay nu silamalay a Bu-s buyu'. Bu-s buyu' a singkuŚĮĆŚ£ęŚĪĪŚģóśēô Cyang-hu a ziday mukayakay tu Bu-s buyu' i binawlanan madengdengay. amin ku bnawlan,. Binawlan amin sakay Bi-s buyu' icelang ku singku, micidek I Cyang-hu paykitizaan yadah ku niatulan tu tanem. mahiniay "Bu-s tadem. uyza taneng micekul tu Bu-s buyu' u lala' ku sapisaupu nu tademaway a nisannga'an aadidi'ay a buyu', i adidi'ay tukun nu buyu' patizeng tu pantaay a sen-se pitaungan nu tademaw. namahiza, caay katayza i Bu-s buyu' taneng itini mitanam mukayayay tu Bu-a buyu'. Mahiniay Bu-s tanem yadah ku mapanganganay u "cyen-cyen-san" anucaay caw-syung-san". uzuma makay kang-wan micekul tu Bu-s buyu', patizeng tu cyen-cyen-sen-se nu ba'tuay paya a salisin. Bu-s buyu' paymihcaan 9 a bulad nu teban kastukuh 10 a bulad nu teban malingatu sisuleda, tukun nu buyu' masaupu ku suleda, katukuh zuma a mihcaan tu 6 a bulad haymaw satu malananum, uzuma 7 a bulad nu teban mahiza tu sisuleda. Sakasa paymihcaan tu 7, 8 a buladan u sakapahay a puu' a mukayakay tu Bu-s a buyu', zuma a puu'an edepen ku buyu' 8 a bulad yadah ku baliyus, sakapahay 7 a bulad mukayakay tu Bu-s buyu'. kanahatu u talaka nu Bu-s buyu' katukuh 3776 depah, nika kasa cumudan a tabuyu' hatu I 2000 depah, sisa u madayumay tu, caay piecaw ku tademaw taneng tu mukayaka tya buyu', paymihcaan pinaay a emang ku mukayakayay a tademaw tu Bu-s a buyu', pangkiw ku tademaw malekuay tatukun nu buyu'. tabuyu', makay u-he-mu katukuh tukud nu buyu' tanektekay a tademaw 7 katukuh 10 a tatukuan ku nipalawpe tu tatukian, mudebu 3 katukuh 5 a tatukian ku nipalapes tu tatuki. ayzaay a mihcaan tatultul sa mabuwah, liwliw nu Bu-s buyu' tini dada' I 2021 a mihca 12 a bulad 3 a demiad uyni a demiad kina sepat tu t uku ninel, katuud ku maenepay tu nikabuwah. sakamu sa ku migingkiway sangaleb anuayaw a muliyaw aca tu tabakiay a ninel tu 9.0. . malalitin tu i hekalay atu natinengan
